query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`registeredAt`, '%Y-%m'), COUNT(*), COALESCE(SUM(`totalSpent`), 0) FROM `customers` WHERE `customers`.`registeredAt` IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(`customers`.`registeredAt`, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(`customers`.`registeredAt`, '%Y-%m') LIMIT 3;
